criteriaResults.evidence: name:bober-diagnose, description starts 'Use when investigating a production incident...', MIT+obra/superpowers attribution lines 6-7.
Iron Law fenced @22-24 'NO REMEDIATION WITHOUT VERIFIED ROOT CAUSE AT TWO INDEPENDENT BOUNDARIES'. 11 Red Flags, 8 Rationalization rows (>=6).
4 phases in order. 3 GATING blocks: Phase1->2 @84-86, Phase2->3 @118-120, Phase3->4 @150-152. All 'BEFORE proceeding to Phase N+1, you MUST...' inside <EXTREMELY-IMPORTANT>.
Phase 1: confirm symptom current @58-61, scope @63-66, timing @68-72, observations.jsonl record @73-81 with {timestamp,phase,observation,source,verified} worked example.
Phase 2: boundary chain @92-95 (client→CDN→LB→service→cache→DB→storage), obs__<provider>__<tool> @97-106 (5 examples), changelog.jsonl correlation @108-112.
Phase 3 step 3 @136 'ACTIVELY DISPROVE the Top Hypothesis (REQUIRED — not advisory)'. Literal sentence @137 'A hypothesis you cannot disprove is not strongly tested.'

Phase 4 @156 'Resolution criteria MUST be defined BEFORE remediation'. All 5 fields @158-168 (metric/threshold/window/baseline/source). bober-deployer + Tier 2 checkpoint @174-177. Forbids 'dashboard looks better' @184,189.
All 4 cross-refs present: bober.debug @243, bober.runbook @244, bober.deploy @175,178,245, .bober/anti-patterns/ @132,246.
All 4 strategies exit 0. 920 tests pass, 4 skipped — no regressions.

summary: All 9 criteria pass on iter 1. bober.diagnose substantively distinct from bober.debug (system vs code level). Iron Law verbatim, three hard gates (not advisory), Phase 3 disproof REQUIRED, Phase 4 PRE-DEFINED criteria with explicit forbid of 'dashboard looks better'. Schema names align with Sprint 19 (observations.jsonl/changelog.jsonl/actions.jsonl/hypotheses.md).
